cdsRules: Artifact changes require a fresh variant-specific CDS archive.
CDS evidence requires artifact hash, archive hash, semantic smoke, V2-C, V2-D, and runtime mapping proof.
CDS and no-CDS evidence cannot be compared as one policy.
noCdsRules: CDS, AppCDS, Leyden, and runtime javaagents must be disabled.
Preflight requires an artifact or deployment-layer fingerprint before relying on historical scope.
